projectDescription: A campaign management and automation platform for media buyers that connects ad networks, trackers, and analytics tools to automate optimization, launch campaigns at scale, and manage performance across all accounts in one place.
keyFeatures: Cross-account campaign management across Facebook, TikTok, Taboola, Outbrain, MGID, and more
Automated rules engine with conditions, actions, scheduling, and global rules
Rule chains using tags to build multi-step optimization sequences
Mass campaign launcher with bulk creation, variation groups, and multi-account launch
Creative Library with aggregated cross-campaign performance analytics
Tracking platform integrations (ClickFlare, Voluum, RedTrack, Bemob, GA4, and more)
Google Sheets and CSV data upload for unsupported trackers
Team collaboration with role-based ad account access
publicApiSurface: GET /campaigns — list campaigns across connected ad networks
POST /manual-stats-update — upload CSV data for tracker conversions and revenue
Campaign Creation Queue API — submit and monitor bulk campaign launches
Creative Library API — upload creatives, media, and headlines programmatically
Google Sheets integration — automated data sync every 30 minutes
